meaning_preservation_checks: support-state boundary preserved in reader prose
source boundary preserved or reconciled back to the live chapter
proof/test status preserved without adding unrun results
implementation horizon preserved without implying current implementation
release blocker status preserved until an edition release record clears it
meaning-changing caveats either preserved or fixed in the live chapter

graduation_modes.meaning: Curated chapter files may exist for prose work, individual chapter records may be drafting or reconciled, and every chapter keeps release blockers until format review and an edition release record clear them.
Curated chapter files are being checked against live claims, generated baselines, support boundaries, proof/test status, and implementation horizons.
All curated chapters are reconciled and may be used as reader-release input only after format review and an edition release record exist.

non_claims: This contract does not create curated reader chapter files.
This contract does not create or approve EPUB, PDF, DOCX, HTML, audio, or audio-embedded EPUB artifacts.
This contract does not promote any Appendix C support state.
This contract is not equal authority beside the live AI/research book.
